hero_subtitle: SFTY supports regulated digital asset businesses with phased deployment of role-based access, audit evidence, governance controls and bank due diligence workflows for enterprise readiness.

problem_title: Enterprise compliance slows without clear roadmap
problem_description: Institutions face difficulty coordinating phased implementation across multiple compliance functions and providers. This lack of a structured deployment plan limits audit readiness, delays bank due diligence, and complicates governance control on evidence and access.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes multi-provider outputs, role-based access, audit logs and evidence controls into a clear phased implementation model aligned to enterprise readiness and bank due diligence requirements.
workflow_title: From deployment setup to ongoing governance
workflow_description: SFTY guides enterprise implementation by linking role-based access, audit logs, evidence integrity and operational controls into a secure compliance workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another compliance tool. The enterprise control layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides regulated digital asset businesses a provider-neutral layer that preserves evidence, tracks decisions, enforces governance and supports audit-ready compliance workflows.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports regulated VASPs with phased deployment, provider orchestration, evidence preservation and bank due diligence to meet enterprise governance and audit standards.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer connecting provider outputs into structured workflows, supporting regulated digital asset businesses with role-based access, audit logs, governance, evidence integrity and operational readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support phased implementation?
faq_2_answer: SFTY supports phased rollout by starting with core workflows and integrating providers incrementally, allowing gradual configuration of rules, roles, cases and reporting for scalable enterprise compliance deployment.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence history, decision logs and case data with role-based access and audit logging to maintain an auditable trail supporting regulatory review and bank due diligence.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers and connects their outputs into one connected compliance operating layer.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace providers or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace existing providers but organizes their outputs into structured cases, decisions, regulatory updates and audit-ready workflows.
final_title: Review phased deployment steps for enterprise readiness
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, audit evidence, governance and bank due diligence across compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
